## Won't strip protectants and coatings
Q²M LeatherCleaner Mild is the ideal solution for daily maintenance and pre-coating preparation of leather upholstery. Free from softening additives, it ensures a residue-free cleaning that won't compromise the performance of a quality ceramic coating. Q²M LeatherCleaner Mild imparts a fully matte finish and is compatible with all contemporary leather types. It can be safely applied to coated leather, preserving the coating while gently cleansing the surface.

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-cleaner-mild-1.jpg?v=1702592377&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-cleaner-mild.jpg?v=1702592377&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-cleaner-banner.jpg?v=1702513683&width=2400)

Safe Cleaning
Q²M LeatherCleaner Mild is a gentle yet highly effective pre-coating leather cleaner. Formulated in collaboration with Gyeon's premium Q² LeatherShield, it stands as the ultimate leather preparation product for use before applying a coating. 
This cleaner effectively eliminates light dirt, oily residue, and even light discoloration. Notably, the formula excludes softening or preserving additives, ensuring a surface that is fully prepared for coating.

[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-glass-cleaner_195e98be-cca3-4fce-9747-c51772c714c7.jpg?v=1702514049&width=1080)

Resistant to UV, abrasion, dye, and spills. Works on vegan leather as well.

## Interior Detailer
Provides a quick clean, and eliminates 99% of bacteria and germs. Safe on *all *surfaces including Alcantara and LCD screens.

[
Shop GYEON Interior Detailer
](https://carzilla.ca/collections/brand-gyeon/products/gyeon-q-m-interior-detailer-500ml)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-cleaner-mild-banner.jpg?v=1702592524&width=2400)

Works on vinyl and plastics
Start by vacuuming the upholstery. Mix Q²M LeatherCleaner Mild with water to increase foam and aid in distributing the cleaner. Apply the solution using the Q²M LeatherBrush, working in sections. 
**TIP:** Remove dirt with a microfiber in a straight motion. Utilize at least three towels: one for the initial wipe, a damp one to remove suds, and another one to dry the surface.

**Scroll down for detailer reviews and FAQs.**

Description

## MILD LEATHER CLEANER DEDICATED FOR SEMI-ANILINE AND NAPPA LEATHER

Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural is a safe, pH-neutral cleaner designed for all types of modern automotive leather. Specifically crafted for delicate nappa and semi-aniline upholstery in luxury and sports cars, it is equally suitable for any other modern leather upholstery. This ultimate leather preparation product is developed in tandem with Gyeon’s high-end Q² LeatherShield EVO & Q² LeatherCoat redefined. It effectively eliminates light dirt, oily residue, and even mild discoloration. Unlike most leather cleaners, the formula excludes softening or preserving additives, leaving a surface primed for coating.

**GENTLE CLEAN FOR ANY TYPE OF LEATHER: **Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural is the ideal solution for daily maintenance and pre-coating preparation of leather upholstery. Free from softening additives, it leaves no residue that might compromise the quality of a ceramic coating. Providing a fully matte finish, it is suitable for all modern types of leather, including coated leather, without affecting the coating.

**BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN: **Begin by vacuuming the upholstery. Utilize Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural with water to enhance foam and facilitate even distribution of the cleaner. Employ the Q²M ScrubPad EVO, working in sections. TIP: Remove dirt with a microfiber cloth in a straight motion. Use at least three towels: one for the initial wipe, a damp one to eliminate suds, and another to dry the surface.

CONSUMPTION: 60~100ml/car

Does it work on aniline and semi-aniline leather?

Leather Cleaner Mild & Strong only works with 'finished' or coated automotive leather. Do not use on Aniline un-coated leather or semi aniline leather. 
Use GYEON LeatherCleaner Natural instead, this one's safe on aniline and semi-aniline.

Will it remove dye transfer?

Yes and no. It depends on how long the dye has been on the leather. Leather is fairly porous, and dye can migrate *into *the material, making it challenging to remove. If caught within a few days, Leather Cleaner Strong can potentially remove it. However, if the dye is etched into the leather, redyeing the finish may be necessary.

Is it shiny?

No, both Leather Cleaner Strong and Mild will yield a matte finish.

What else can I clean with it?

Not limited to leather, it can also clean plastics, vinyl, vegan leather, dashboards, and trim.

Does it lather?

Yes, it will lather when agitated with a brush and works in a foaming bottle as well.

What's the difference between Mild and Strong?

Mild is excellent for maintenance, while Strong can effectively remove leather protection products for a full strip and deep clean.
